notes: Level 6 manual review override shard for spell indexes 25-29 in generated discovery row order.
This shard closes mechanics encoded in the structured Markdown/runtime JSON edits and keeps genuinely missing first-class runtime fields actionable-open.

magic-jar::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The possession save and host-death self-save are present in structured prose/options, but runtime lacks a possession attempt effect and self-save consequence model.
magic-jar::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add possession attempt/save fields and self-save aftermath fields.
magic-jar::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime possessionAttempt and hostDeathSelfSave data.

magic-jar::reaction_or_opportunity_restr.issue: The caster cannot take Reactions while in the container; runtime records this in MOVEMENT description but lacks a first-class reaction suppression field.
magic-jar::reaction_or_opportunity_restr.recommendedTemplateChange: Add action/reaction restriction fields with allowed action exceptions.

magic-jar::target_filter_or_eligibility.issue: Possession requires a visible Humanoid within 100 feet and excludes creatures warded by Protection from Evil and Good or Magic Circle; runtime only records this as utility option prose.
magic-jar::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedTemplateChange: Add secondary action target filters and ward-exclusion fields.

magic-jar::vision_light_sound.issue: The visible-Humanoid requirement is recorded in the Possess Humanoid utility option.
magic-jar::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: No separate vision field required for this pass.

magic-jar::sensor_or_remote_perception.issue: The possessed creature's soul perceives from the container using its own senses; runtime records this in utility/status prose but lacks a first-class perception-origin field.

magic-jar::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: Protection from Evil and Good and Magic Circle prevent possession, but runtime lacks ward-prevention integration.
magic-jar::ward_alarm_or_trigger.recommendedTemplateChange: Add blocked-by-spell/effect fields for possession and similar mechanics.

magic-jar::object_stats_or_damageability.issue: The container stores souls, can be destroyed, is destroyed when the spell ends, and possession replaces several caster statistics with host values; runtime lacks object lifecycle and stat-replacement fields.
magic-jar::object_stats_or_damageability.recommendedTemplateChange: Add soul-container lifecycle and host-stat replacement fields.
magic-jar::object_stats_or_damageability.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime soulContainer and hostStatReplacement data.

magic-jar::status_or_state_change.issue: The possessed soul's Incapacitated state is represented as a STATUS_CONDITION effect; death/body-state consequences remain tracked in object/ending buckets.
magic-jar::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional status field required for Incapacitated.

magic-jar::conditional_ending.issue: Soul return, caster death, host death, body distance, body dead, and container destruction outcomes are too specific for current duration fields.
magic-jar::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional spell-ending and soul-return outcome fields.

magic-jar::aftermath_or_memory.issue: The container is destroyed when the spell ends; runtime lacks on-spell-end object destruction data.
magic-jar::aftermath_or_memory.closedReason: Closed by the created-object cleanup batch: structured markdown and runtime JSON now use effects[].endCleanup[] with spell_material_container, spell_component, all_remaining, and destroy on spell end.

mass-suggestion::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Wisdom save and negated Charmed condition are represented by STATUS_CONDITION condition.saveType/saveEffect.

mass-suggestion::vision_light_sound.issue: Mass Suggestion's target hearing and understanding prerequisites are represented by Target Can Hear/Understand Caster and runtime communicationPrerequisites; prompt word-count details remain open under message_or_communication.
mass-suggestion::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field needed; existing target communication prerequisite fields now cover this eligibility mechanic.
mass-suggestion::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime targeting/effect communicationPrerequisites now require the target to hear and understand the caster.

mass-suggestion::message_or_communicatio.issue: The 25-word suggestion is represented as a communication utility option, but runtime lacks a prompt/input field for the actual suggested phrase and a word-count cap.
mass-suggestion::message_or_communicatio.recommendedTemplateChange: Add prompt text and word-limit fields for spoken/written command mechanics.

mass-suggestion::social_or_knowledge_eff.issue: Achievable and non-obviously-damaging suggestion constraints are represented as utility options, but runtime lacks validation fields for social instruction constraints.

mass-suggestion::status_or_state_change.issue: The Charmed condition is represented as a STATUS_CONDITION effect with duration details.
mass-suggestion::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional status field required for this pass.

mass-suggestion::conditional_ending.issue: The spell can end per target when the activity is completed, or when the caster/allies damage that target; runtime lacks per-target conditional ending data.
mass-suggestion::conditional_ending.closedReason: Reused existing caster_or_ally_damages_target and suggested_activity_completed conditional-ending triggers, recorded them in structured markdown, and mapped both runtime effects with effect scope for per-target endings.

mental-prison::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Intelligence save, half-like initial damage behavior, failed-save Restrained condition, and escape-trigger damage are represented.
mental-prison::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional save field required for this pass.
mental-prison::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by DAMAGE, STATUS_CONDITION, and trigger damage effects.

mental-prison::vision_light_sound.issue: The target's inability to see or hear beyond the illusion is represented as sensory utility data.
mental-prison::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional vision/light/sound field required for this pass.

mental-prison::illusion_or_disguise.issue: The illusory cell, target-only perception, and breach triggers are represented as utility and damage effects, but runtime lacks a first-class illusion enclosure and breach-trigger model.
mental-prison::illusion_or_disguise.recommendedTemplateChange: Add illusion enclosure and breach-trigger fields.
mental-prison::illusion_or_disguise.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime illusionCell and illusionBreachTriggers data.

mental-prison::sensor_or_remote_percepti.issue: The target-only perception of the illusory cell is represented as sensory utility.
mental-prison::sensor_or_remote_percepti.recommendedTemplateChange: No separate sensor field required for this pass.

mental-prison::social_or_knowledge_effec.issue: Mental Prison's immunity-to-Charmed automatic success rule is now encoded as a save auto-outcome override; the remaining illusion prison behavior stays in its other open buckets.
mental-prison::social_or_knowledge_effec.recommendedTemplateChange: Closed for this auto-success social/knowledge finding by Save Auto Outcome auto_success with condition immune_to_charmed.
mental-prison::social_or_knowledge_effec.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by runtime condition.saveOutcomeOverrides carrying immune_to_charmed -> auto_success.

mental-prison::status_or_state_change.issue: Restrained is represented as a STATUS_CONDITION effect; Charmed immunity auto-success is tracked separately as a schema gap.
mental-prison::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional status field required for Restrained.

mental-prison::environmental_change.issue: The dangerous perceived environment is target-only illusion prose; the mechanical restriction and damage triggers are represented.
mental-prison::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No separate environmental field required beyond the illusion gap.
mental-prison::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by UTILITY sensory and DAMAGE trigger effects for this pass.

mental-prison::conditional_ending.issue: The spell ends on successful initial save and after breach-trigger damage; runtime records the damage but lacks first-class conditional spell-ending triggers.
mental-prison::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional spell-ending triggers for save success and breach events.

move-earth::choice_or_mode.issue: Terrain shaping modes and the option to choose a new area every 10 minutes are represented as utility options.
move-earth::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional choice field required for this pass.

move-earth::terrain_or_surface.issue: The 40-foot terrain area, half-dimension transformation cap, 10-minute completion time, repeated area choice, and terrain material restrictions are represented, but runtime lacks first-class terrain-shaping mode/cap/timing fields.
move-earth::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add terrain-shaping mode, material, cap, and transformation-time fields.

move-earth::created_object_or_structure.issue: Walls, trenches, pillars, accommodating rocks/structures, and possible collapse are represented as utility options, but runtime lacks created terrain feature and structural instability fields.
move-earth::created_object_or_structure.recommendedTemplateChange: Add terrain feature creation and structure instability fields.
move-earth::created_object_or_structure.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime terrainFeatureCreation and structureInstability data.

move-earth::healing_or_restoration.issue: The detector matched 'unstable' in the collapse sentence; there is no healing or restoration mechanic.

move-earth::status_or_state_change.issue: The detector matched possible structure collapse; this is structure/environment risk, not a creature status condition.

move-earth::environmental_change.issue: Slow terrain transformation, plant carry-along, rock/structure accommodation, and possible collapse are represented in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class environmental transformation fields.
move-earth::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental transformation fields for slow reshape, carried vegetation, and structure accommodation/collapse.

otilukes-freezing-sphere::choice_or_mode.issue: Choosing the explosion point and choosing to store, throw, sling, set down, or delay the globe are represented by targeting, spatial details, and utility options.
otilukes-freezing-sphere::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional choice field required for this pass.
otilukes-freezing-sphere::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by targeting and UTILITY controlOptions/grantedActions.

otilukes-freezing-sphere::attack_or_save.issue: The Constitution save and half-damage outcome are represented by the DAMAGE effect.

otilukes-freezing-sphere::terrain_or_sur.issue: The frozen-water surface trapping creatures is represented by TERRAIN and STATUS_CONDITION effects.
otilukes-freezing-sphere::terrain_or_sur.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional terrain field required for this pass.
otilukes-freezing-sphere::terrain_or_sur.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by TERRAIN frozen-water effect and STATUS_CONDITION Restrained.

otilukes-freezing-sphere::created_object.issue: Frozen water and a stored globe are represented, but runtime lacks first-class created object/storage lifecycle fields for the globe and ice object stats.
otilukes-freezing-sphere::created_object.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created object lifecycle and ice object/stat fields.
otilukes-freezing-sphere::created_object.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime storedProjectile and createdIceObject data.

otilukes-freezing-sphere::resource_or_co.issue: The stored globe can be handed off, thrown, slung, set down, shatter on impact, or explode after 1 minute; runtime stores utility actions but lacks first-class stored projectile state/ownership/expiration fields.
otilukes-freezing-sphere::resource_or_co.recommendedTemplateChange: Add stored spell projectile resource/lifecycle fields.

otilukes-freezing-sphere::status_or_stat.issue: Restrained for creatures trapped in frozen water is represented as a STATUS_CONDITION effect with break-free details in description.
otilukes-freezing-sphere::status_or_stat.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional status field required for this pass.

otilukes-freezing-sphere::environmental_.issue: Water freezing, trapped swimmers, stored globe handling, and delayed explosion are represented in terrain/status/utility effects, with remaining first-class object lifecycle gaps tracked separately.
otilukes-freezing-sphere::environmental_.recommendedTemplateChange: No separate environmental field required beyond created-object/resource gaps.
otilukes-freezing-sphere::environmental_.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by TERRAIN, STATUS_CONDITION, and UTILITY effects for this pass.
